cards.name: 6 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generosity, charity, community, material help, support, sharing, giving and receiving, gratitude

cards.name: Queen of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, giving too much, overly-sensitive, needy, fragile, dependence, martyrdom

cards.name: 4 of Cups
cards.interpretation: apathy, contemplation, feeling disconnected, melancholy, boredom, indifference, discontent
